title: SkywalkerShares Business Account - Product Sheet
text:
SkywalkerShares Business Account (Nigeria)

Purpose:
- A business account designed for SMEs to manage business finances.

Safe benefits to mention (avoid absolutes):
- Helps keep business and personal finances separate.
- Supports everyday business transactions and payments.
- Helps with basic tracking of incoming and outgoing transactions.

Compliance-safe constraints:
- Do not guarantee approvals or onboarding timelines.
- Do not claim lowest fees/best rates.
- Do not promise profits/returns or risk-free outcomes.

Suggested CTAs:
- Learn more
- Get started
- Open a business account
